chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6147 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objections No.4, 16, 22 & 24. 2. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rashid Mustafa Solangi, advocate and Mr. Khuram Raza Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Abdus Samad Khan, AD (Legal) NADRA. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Amin Ahmed, AD Passports. Statement filed on behalf of the respondent is taken on record. Per learned counsel, in view of foregoing, petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
